title: Dataset accompanying manuscipt entitled "Molecular approach to unbiased staging of ovarian development in tuna (Thunnus albacares) fish"
author: Cancio, Ibon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer electropherograms of total RNA (nano-chips and small.chips) extracted from yellowfin tuna ovaries accompanying the manuscript "  Molecular approach to unbiased staging of ovarian development in tuna ( Thunnus albacares ) fish  " by  Joyanta Bir, Oihane Diaz de Cerio, Maren Ortiz-Zarragoitia, Patricia Lastra Luque, Deniz Kukul, Iker Zudaire     and Ibon Cancio. The dataset also contain RNA index values and qPCR data with transcription levels of RNAP-III related genes.
steps_raw: This dataset contains Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer electropherograms of total RNA (nano-chips and small.chips) extracted from yellowfin tuna ovaries accompanying the manuscript "  Molecular approach to unbiased staging of ovarian development in tuna ( Thunnus albacares ) fish  " by  Joyanta Bir, Oihane Diaz de Cerio, Maren Ortiz-Zarragoitia, Patricia Lastra Luque, Deniz Kukul, Iker Zudaire     and Ibon Cancio. The dataset also contain RNA index values and qPCR data with transcription levels of RNAP-III related genes.
